messages.content: You are the Host Forensics Expert. Target OS: Windows. Vector Space: 4D windows_math. Source: Sysmon event stream. Schema: sysmon_event_id, Image, CommandLine, ParentImage, User, IntegrityLevel, TargetImage, GrantedAccess, TargetObject, Details, ImageLoaded, Signed, SignatureStatus, PipeName, QueryName, TargetFilename, TamperingType, Hashes. Identify Living-off-the-Land (LOLBAS) tradecraft. Output MITRE ATT&CK + containment.

Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: sysmon_sensor
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Windows Host Telemetry — wmic.exe WMI Proxy Execution.
Host: LT-74  User: jsmith
  EventID=1 (Process Create)
    Image: wmic.exe  ParentImage: cmd.exe
    CommandLine: wmic process call create "powershell.exe -w hidden -enc HKCo4C76hVXXqrGi0BiQnwM4hvOM4J"...
    (local WMI process creation to spawn hidden PowerShell (bypasses direct PS parent))
  EventID=1 (WMI-spawned child — NOT direct child of wmic.exe)
    Image: cmd.exe  ParentImage: WmiPrvSE.exe  PID=43578
    (WmiPrvSE.exe is the WMI provider host — child appears under it)
    wmiprvse_parent_breaks_direct_process_lineage=YES

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  wmic.exe is a Windows Management Instrumentation command-line tool used by IT for hardware inventory (wmic computersystem get model), service management, and performance queries. Legitimate use has no 'process call create' — that is exclusively an execution method.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  'process call create' in wmic commandline = direct process spawning via WMI. The spawned process appears as child of WmiPrvSE.exe (WMI provider host), not wmic.exe — this is a known evasion of parent-child process tree detections. local WMI process creation to spawn hidden PowerShell (bypasses direct PS parent). No legitimate admin use case involves spawning cmd.exe via WMI from an interactive session from cmd.exe.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Host LT-74 (jsmith): wmic.exe used as execution proxy — WmiPrvSE.exe child cmd.exe breaks expected process lineage. WMI process creation confirmed.
[CONCLUSION] wmic.exe proxy execution confirmed — WmiPrvSE.exe spawning cmd.exe.
</analysis>
TRUE POSITIVE. MITRE T1047 (Windows Management Instrumentation). Kill cmd.exe (WmiPrvSE child), investigate cmd.exe for initial delivery.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: contain

Spatial Anomaly Detected.
Source: sysmon_sensor
Vector: <|spatial_vector|>
Windows Host Telemetry — wmic System Inventory Query.
  EventID=1  Image: wmic.exe  ParentImage: cmd.exe
    CommandLine: wmic computersystem get model,manufacturer,serialnumber
    no_process_call_create=YES  no_network_connection=YES
  no_WmiPrvSE_child=YES  context=IT_asset_inventory  user=svc-cmdb

<analysis>
[AXIS 1] Benign Alternative Assessment:
  wmic querying hardware inventory — no process call create, no network, service account.
[AXIS 2] Behavioral Proof Assessment:
  No 'process call create'. No network. No WmiPrvSE child. Service account context.
[AXIS 3] Entity Coverage:
  Authorized wmic inventory query — read-only, no execution.
[CONCLUSION] wmic inventory query — no execution, service account.
</analysis>
FALSE POSITIVE. T1047 — AUTHORIZED INVENTORY QUERY. No action.
RECOMMENDED_ACTION: dismiss
